title: Unexpected error `interface conversion: expression.Expression is *expression.Constant, not *expression.ScalarFunction`
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 DATE);
INSERT INTO t2(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c2 = d OR (c1 IS NULL AND c3 = d);
key_bug_features: EXECUTE prepared query with NULL parameters causes interface conversion error
